response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software engineering experience across multiple domains and technologies, including recent work with AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq, but lacks explicit AI-focused leadership, product development, or strategic customer advisory experience required for a Principal Engineer role. His background in cloud-native and distributed systems is strong, but his recent roles skew toward hands-on development rather than high-level strategy or AI product innovation.
strengths: Strong distributed systems and low-latency app experience
Recent AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq
Entrepreneurial background with GISCollective and open-source contributions
concerns: No clear evidence of AI product/platform leadership or strategic advisory roles
Limited cloud platform expertise (e.g., AWS, GCP, Azure) beyond basic usage
No PhD or advanced AI-related degree, which is preferred
